title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Garry Tan uses Claude Code to ship large volumes of code while leading Y Combinator, extracting four core strategies: assigning Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building. Marchese treats these practices as a playbook for agentic business workflows.
